title: dryopteris scabra
intro: Dryopteris scabra, also known as the scaly male fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its scaly rhizome and lance-shaped fronds. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris scabra have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries, with its extracts showing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Dryopteris scabra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbal practitioners also using it in combination with other plants for enhanced therapeutic effects.
